title: Sales & Leasing Executive (Forklifts/LCV) | $3K Basic + Commission
description:
• Up to $3,000 Basic (Fresh grads start at $2.3K) + Monthly Commission + Variable Bonus.

  • Company Van provided (can be driven home upon approval) or Transport Allowance if using your own car.

  • Mon–Fri (8:30 AM – 5:30 PM) & Alternate Saturdays (8:30 AM – 12:30 PM).

  • Based at 23 Jalan Buroh, covering industrial estates across Singapore.

Job Summary

Join a leading provider of Material Handling solutions. We are looking for dynamic "Hunters" (80% New Business / 20% Account Management) to drive leasing and rental contracts for forklifts and light commercial vehicles (LCV). While we provide comprehensive training, we require individuals with the "hustle" to connect with clients on the ground.

Key Responsibilities

  • New Business Hunting: Be active on the ground, visiting industrial estates to secure leasing and rental contracts.

  • Relationship Building: Conduct live demonstrations and test drives to help clients understand their equipment needs.

  • Deal Closing: Negotiate and finalize trade-in and hire-purchase agreements.

  • Full-Cycle Management: Manage the process from lead follow-up to pre-delivery inspections and paperwork.

  • Problem Solving: Collaborate with aftersales teams to ensure long-term customer satisfaction.

Requirements

  • Must possess a Valid Class 3 Driving License.

  • At least 2 years of relevant experience is required.

  • Must have experience dealing with Forklifts, light commercial vehicles (LCV), vans, or small lorries.

  • Minimum NITEC / Higher NITEC / GCE 'O' Level.

  • Strong communication skills, self-disciplined, and a "can-do" attitude.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
